title: Campus or Program Charters: Partnership Charters
description: Conroe ISD has the option to create special campus or program charters that allow certain schools or programs to operate with more flexibility in how they are structured and run. These partnership charters are agreements between the district and a campus that can customize things like schedules, staffing, or instructional approaches to better meet student needs. Parents and community members may find this relevant when exploring unique or alternative learning options available within the district.
